flags.message: The predict prompt directs cells to anchor modern cert base rates on the 'Modern discretionary-cert petitions by disposition' section of the committed metrics/statpack.md, but the current statpack has no such section (nor a by-era cut), and its SCOTUS by-Term table shows 0 resolved cases for every listed Term. I fell back on the scotus by-court row (granted 1.4% of 296 resolved) plus a fedcourts query sample. Either the statpack needs regenerating with the modern-cert cut or the prompt reference is stale.
